metrics.name: fgp_active_requests
metrics.help: Number of requests currently being processed.

metrics.name: fgp_circuit_breaker_open
metrics.help: Whether the circuit breaker is open (1) or closed (0).

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_active_peers
metrics.help: Number of currently-open Diameter peer connections.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_avp_type_mismatch_total
metrics.help: Diameter AVPs whose decoded wire type does not match the dictionary.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_avp_unknown_total
metrics.help: Diameter AVPs whose (app, code, vendor) tuple is not in the loaded dictionary.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_dictionary_avp_count
metrics.help: Number of AVPs loaded in the dictionary, per application id.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_dictionary_reload_total
metrics.help: Diameter dictionary reload outcomes.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_forward_duration_seconds
metrics.help: Wall-clock latency of Diameter relay forward attempts, by result.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_forward_total
metrics.help: Diameter relay forward outcomes by result.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_loop_detected_total
metrics.help: Diameter loop-detection events (RFC 6733 §6.1.8) by direction.

metrics.name: fgp_diameter_requests_total
metrics.help: Total Diameter requests handled by the relay, by Application-Id, Command-Code and observed Result-Code.

metrics.name: fgp_errors_total
metrics.help: Total number of errors by category.

metrics.name: fgp_filter_chain_length
metrics.help: Number of filters in the active request/response chain.

metrics.name: fgp_filter_decisions_total
metrics.help: Total number of filter decisions.

metrics.name: fgp_filter_duration_seconds
metrics.help: Per-filter execution duration in seconds.

metrics.name: fgp_policy_reload_errors_total
metrics.help: Number of failed policy reload attempts.

metrics.name: fgp_producer_requests_total
metrics.help: Total requests forwarded to producers.

metrics.name: fgp_rate_limit_exceeded_total
metrics.help: Number of requests rejected by rate limiting.

metrics.name: fgp_request_duration_seconds
metrics.help: Request duration in seconds.

metrics.name: fgp_requests_total
metrics.help: Total number of requests processed by FGP.

metrics.name: fgp_sync_lag_seconds
metrics.help: Seconds since last successful policy sync from database.
